title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and Python/JS bindings to run Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma and other models locally with one command.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama: chat, generate, embed, pull, list, delete models via simple client.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript SDK that mirrors the Python API for Node & browser usage.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package to use Ollama models as LLM, chat or embedding endpoints.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (ChatGPT-like interface) with multi-user, RAG, code highlighting.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama offering synchronous & asynchronous APIs and model management.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama + Chroma + LangChain to chat with local PDFs or text.

title: chatbox-ai
summary: Cross-platform desktop client (Electron) supporting Ollama, OpenAI, Claude with conversation sync.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.0 integration providing OllamaGenerator & OllamaChatGenerator nodes.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Experimental VS Code extension turning Ollama models into inline code copilots.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU & PVC support.

title: ollama-nim
summary: Nim wrapper for Ollama REST API with native async/await and model management helpers.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Rust crate providing typed client, streaming support and ergonomic model operations.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET SDK for Ollama with strong typing, IAsyncEnumerable streaming and dependency-injection helpers.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds AI assistant pane powered by local Ollama models.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot turning any Ollama model into a slash-command chatbot.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Lightweight Slack bot using Socket-Mode to chat with Ollama models in channels or DMs.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module exposing Ollama as a CI step for LLM-based testing or documentation generation.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Streamlit boilerplate for building conversational apps backed by Ollama with session memory.

title: ollama-qt
summary: Native Qt6 desktop GUI for Ollama featuring model gallery, GPU monitoring and chat export.
